description_long: This house features a rectangular footprint with a light gray brick exterior and a flat roof, giving it a modern, urban appearance. The front facade includes a covered porch area with a dark overhang and several large windows, flanked by small landscaped planters. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on all visible sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The interior layout is open, with visible living spaces, bedrooms, and hallways, and the main entryway is accentuated by the porch and overhang. The roof is flat, and the house appears to be a single-story structure with a clean, minimalist design. The overall aesthetic is functional and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light gray brick exterior, and symmetrical window rows. The front features a covered porch with landscaped planters and a dark overhang.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entryway with a covered porch, dark overhang, and landscaped planters, as well as large windows and a glimpse of the open interior layout.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the symmetrical arrangement of windows and the uninterrupted brick facade, with less emphasis on the entryway.
description_view_2: The rear view displays more windows in a symmetrical pattern and reveals the open-plan interior, with no visible entryway or porch.
description_view_3: This side view shows additional windows and the side of the covered porch, as well as the flat roof and the continuation of the brick exterior.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, dark overhang, and landscaped planters; simple modern door with no ornate detailing.
